---
title: 'Writing'
date: '2016-01-20T16:16:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7179873567388196437'
blogger_filename: '/2016/01/writing.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

So... I have from 9-2 today to write. From 9-10 I read short fiction submissions and watched some videos. Because I don't feel like starting. I don't feel I know what to write, or where to start. Now it's time to just start. Anywhere. So... I'm starting in my journal.<br />
<br />
OK... I'm going to go write something now.
